Both outstanding tasks require manual action in external dashboards — they can't be completed via code or CLI. How do you want to proceed?

**Task 1 — ledger.caldr.ai DNS A record (ledger → 76.76.21.21)**
→ Needs to be done in your DNS provider (Cloudflare/Namecheap) for caldr.ai, then the domain added in Vercel → Settings → Domains.

**Task 2 — Connect Vercel to GitHub**
→ Needs to be done in Vercel Dashboard → operating-ledger project → Settings → Git.
